summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: Varanasi
film.talent: Priyanka Chopra Jonas; Director: S.S. Rajamouli
film.announcement: First look images released for RRR director S.S. Rajamouli's new film starring Priyanka Chopra Jonas, marked with new images shared on the actress's birthday.

film.title: The Princess and the Frog (Live-Action)
film.talent: Colman Domingo and Robert O'Hara in talks to write
film.announcement: Colman Domingo and Robert O'Hara are in early talks to write Disney's live-action adaptation of 'The Princess and the Frog.'

tv.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
tv.announcement: HBO Max series reunites Curb Your Enthusiasm cast (except Cheryl Hines) and features Larry David mocking RFK Jr. in new content.
